description: A moonlit harbor scene showing a grand neoclassical city waterfront at night. A large domed cathedral dominates the center background, flanked by classical colonnaded buildings. Several sailing vessels and smaller boats are moored in the calm water, which reflects the bright moonlight breaking through dramatic clouds. The warm golden light of the moon creates a luminous path across the water's surface. The silhouettes of masts and rigging frame the composition on both sides.

_meta.title: Giotto, St Francis of Assisi Receiving the Stigmata
